name: Simple Component
prompt: Create a user profile card component that shows an avatar (circular image), full name, email, a short bio, and a row of social media icon links. Use clean, modern styling with subtle shadows and rounded corners.
expectedOutcome: A single component with external template and SCSS, using signals

name: CRUD Feature
prompt: Create a task management feature with: 1) A task list showing title, status (todo/in-progress/done), and due date. 2) An add task form with validation. 3) Ability to toggle task status by clicking. 4) A filter bar to show all/active/completed tasks. Use Angular signals for state management.
expectedOutcome: Multiple components with routing, signals-based state, form validation

name: Dashboard Layout
prompt: Create a dashboard layout with: 1) A fixed sidebar navigation with icons and labels (Home, Analytics, Users, Settings). 2) A top header bar with a search input and user avatar. 3) A main content area with a 2x2 grid of stat cards showing metric name, value, and a trend arrow (up/down). Use CSS Grid and Flexbox.
expectedOutcome: Multi-component layout with sidebar, header, and grid content

name: Complex Form
prompt: Create a multi-step registration form with 3 steps: 1) Personal info (name, email with validation). 2) Address (street, city, country dropdown). 3) Review and submit. Include a progress indicator, back/next buttons, and form validation that prevents advancing with invalid data.
expectedOutcome: Multi-step form with reactive forms or signals, validation, stepper UI

name: Figma Simple Card
prompt: Recreate the selected Figma element as an Angular component
figmaSetup: Select a simple card component in Figma before running
expectedOutcome: Component matching the Figma design with correct fonts and colors

name: Figma Dashboard
prompt: Recreate the selected Figma element as an Angular route in this app
figmaSetup: Select a dashboard/page layout in Figma before running
expectedOutcome: Full page layout matching the Figma design

name: Responsive Landing Page
prompt: Create a responsive landing page with: 1) A hero section with a headline, subtitle, and CTA button. 2) A features section with 3 feature cards in a row (stacking on mobile). 3) A testimonials section with a horizontal scrolling card carousel. 4) A footer with links organized in columns. Make it fully responsive.
expectedOutcome: Responsive layout with media queries, flexbox/grid, scroll behavior

name: Data Table with Sorting
prompt: Create a data table component showing a list of employees (name, department, role, salary, start date). Include: column sorting (click header to sort asc/desc), a search filter input, pagination (10 per page), and alternating row colors. Generate 50 mock employee records.
expectedOutcome: Table with sorting, filtering, pagination, mock data generation
